mapper.select:
SELECT r.record_id, driving_student.student_name, l.charge_ltem_name, role.role_name, l.amount , pay.pay_type, pay.create_time FROM `driving_bill_record` r LEFT JOIN driving_charge_ltem l ON r.charge_ltem_id=l.charge_ltem_id LEFT JOIN sys_role role ON r.role_id=role.role_id LEFT JOIN driving_pay pay ON pay.pay_id=r.pay_id LEFT JOIN driving_student ON r.user_id=driving_student.user_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}

-- 这是查询收入 SELECT SUM( c.amount) annual_total_income FROM driving_charge_ltem c LEFT JOIN driving_bill_record b ON c.charge_ltem_id=b.charge_ltem_id LEFT JOIN driving_pay p ON p.pay_id=b.pay_id
${ew.customSqlSegment} -- WHERE -- b.role_id = 102

-- 支出 SELECT SUM( c.amount) annual_total_expenditure FROM driving_charge_ltem c LEFT JOIN driving_bill_record b ON c.charge_ltem_id=b.charge_ltem_id LEFT JOIN driving_pay p ON p.pay_id=b.pay_id
${ew.customSqlSegment} -- WHERE -- b.role_id = 101

SELECT COUNT(*) total_students FROM driving_student s -- LEFT JOIN driving_bill_record b -- ON b.user_id=s.user_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}

-- 这是查询月收入 SELECT SUM( c.amount) total_income FROM driving_charge_ltem c LEFT JOIN driving_bill_record b ON c.charge_ltem_id=b.charge_ltem_id LEFT JOIN driving_pay p ON p.pay_id=b.pay_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}

-- 月支出 SELECT SUM( c.amount) total_expense FROM driving_charge_ltem c LEFT JOIN driving_bill_record b ON c.charge_ltem_id=b.charge_ltem_id LEFT JOIN driving_pay p ON p.pay_id=b.pay_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT SUM( c.amount) studentPayment FROM driving_charge_ltem c LEFT JOIN driving_bill_record b ON c.charge_ltem_id=b.charge_ltem_id LEFT JOIN driving_pay p ON p.pay_id=b.pay_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}
SELECT SUM( c.amount) otherIncome FROM driving_charge_ltem c LEFT JOIN driving_bill_record b ON c.charge_ltem_id=b.charge_ltem_id LEFT JOIN driving_pay p ON p.pay_id=b.pay_id

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(b.create_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, -- 提取年月（如2025-01） SUM(c.amount) AS monthIncome -- 统计当月收入 FROM driving_charge_ltem c LEFT JOIN driving_bill_record b ON c.charge_ltem_id = b.charge_ltem_id LEFT JOIN driving_pay p ON p.pay_id = b.pay_id ${ew.customSqlSegment} -- 接收年份范围、role_id等条件 GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(b.create_time, '%Y-%m') -- 按年月分组 ORDER BY month ASC -- 按月份升序排列
